description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional lounge with a right-side chaise, upholstered in a dark, matte material that appears to be synthetic leather or vinyl. The lounge features three large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion that extends into the chaise section. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of equal height to the backrest, giving the piece a clean, geometric silhouette. The legs are short and minimally visible, suggesting a low-profile design that keeps the lounge close to the ground. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting, patterns, or decorative stitching. This lounge is designed for comfort and functionality, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, dark L-shaped sectional lounge with a right-side chaise, smooth upholstery, and boxy armrests. Features three large back cushions and a low-profile design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, and the right-side chaise extension.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, boxy armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the clean, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main seat and armrest, with the chaise receding.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion with an extended chaise section on the right.
attribute_backrest_design: Rectangular, medium-height, segmented into three equal sections, straight and unadorned.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; straight, boxy, and equal in height to the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: Short, minimally visible legs, likely straight and made of dark material, providing a low-profile base.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth, and matte with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
